content.summary: CarMatch monetization. Coins as primary currency (1597 observed). Boosters: Undo(free x2), Lightning(free x2), Move(900), Refresh(600). Lives with ad recovery. Multiple event promotions on lobby.

CM19.name: lives_refill_cost
CM19.notes: Cannot observe during unlimited lives event

CM20.name: lives_ad_recovery
CM20.notes: Standard puzzle game pattern; +1 Life via rewarded ad

CM23.name: booster_costs
CM23.notes: Undo/Lightning use counts, Move=900, Refresh=600 coins

CM24.name: booster_free_uses
CM24.notes: Undo x2 and Lightning x2 available as free uses

CM25.name: interstitial_ad_frequency
CM25.notes: No interstitial ads during unlimited lives session

CM26.name: reward_ad_contexts
CM26.notes: Common puzzle game reward ad placements

CM27.name: iap_packages_visible
CM27.notes: Multiple event banners on lobby, shop not explored

CM28.name: currency_types
CM28.notes: Single visible currency: coins. May have premium in shop.

design_analysis.design_intent: Extract monetization design parameters from CarMatch for puzzle genre Design DB
design_analysis.context: External game observation without source code access. Parameters estimated via ADB screenshots + pixel analysis + OCR.
strengths: Direct observation from live game build
concerns: No source code access limits parameter accuracy (~85-89%)
Some parameters require extended play sessions for full accuracy
OCR-dependent values may have recognition errors
design_analysis.reasoning: First puzzle genre entry in Design DB. CarMatch provides baseline parking-lot puzzle mechanics data.
